keyThemes: Strong recurring revenue growth from GI Genius AI platform and Winlevi
Constructive 2026 guidance with double-digit recurring revenue and EBITDA growth
Positive reaction to Clascoterone pipeline/news and product developments
Robust balance sheet (strong cash, no debt) and 2030 growth vision
grok.summary: Cosmo N.V. (ticker C43.F / COPN), focused on GI, dermatology, and health tech, reported 2025 revenue of €104.2M with recurring revenues up 15% to €88.1M (85% of total) and EBITDA of €9.5M. The company secured shareholder approval for a €2.10 dividend, issued upbeat 2026 guidance targeting continued double-digit growth, and benefited from recent positive product news around Clascoterone that drove short-term share gains. Investor and trader sentiment is predominantly positive, underpinned by the shift to high-quality recurring revenues, AI-enabled MedTech, a debt-free balance sheet with substantial cash, and solid long-term pipeline momentum despite some post-results volatility.
grok.sources: 6+ news articles (FY2025 results, AGM outcomes, dividend announcement), 10+ recent X posts mentioning $COPN / C43.F with trading and product commentary

executiveSummary.text: Cosmo is unusual because it combines specialty pharma assets, medical device exposure and a history of partnering rather than building a huge broad sales force alone. That can create attractive optionality, but it also means the story depends heavily on execution around a relatively small set of products and partnerships. The shares deserve attention for niche innovation, but not blind confidence.
